name: Alvin Joy
tagline: I build interactive things, end to end.
bio: I'm Alvin Joy, a full-stack developer from Kerala who loves building interactive applications. I started with Discord bots in discord.js, and these days I build with Flutter and Go at Zimble Systems, with side quests into the web and machine learning. I'm always eager to learn, and I care a lot about open source.
about: I'm a {age} year old who likes software that feels alive: realtime chat, social feeds, things that respond the moment you touch them. That curiosity has turned into shipped projects, merged pull requests in tools I use every day, and a habit of rebuilding my own corner of the internet a little too often. When I'm not coding, I'm exploring new tech and keeping up with the developer community.
